questions.q: If the temperature is 300 K and pressure is measured in atm while volume is in liters, what is the value of the universal gas constant (R)?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
questions.explanation: When pressure is in atm and volume is in liters, use R = 0.0821 L·atm·mol⁻¹·K⁻¹.

questions.q: If pressure is in kPa and volume is in liters, what is the value of the universal gas constant (R)?

questions.explanation: When pressure = kPa and volume = L, use R = 8.314 L·kPa·mol⁻¹·K⁻¹.
